observed_symptoms: No dominant failure pattern was detected.
Success rate is very low while entropy is not recovering.
Recent history shows ineffective entropy-only adjustment.
diagnosis.reasoning: Current results are too weak to justify a no-op, so the diagnosis shifts toward insufficient exploration. Recent history shows that a prior entropy increase did not rescue performance, so the strategy now changes rollout structure instead of repeating the same step.
diagnosis.rollback_trigger: Rollback if success rate and average return both fail to improve in the next round.
